title: Manager Closes
description: A trust-first manager turn that protects the guest experience, resolves friction, earns a confident next step, and reinforces manager traffic control when showroom opportunities are active.
objective: Use a structured, low-pressure manager close to clarify truth, resolve concerns, align next steps, and protect every showroom opportunity through manager awareness, involvement, Save-A-Deal logic, and follow-up ownership.
position_in_journey: After Closing With Confidence → Manager Turn → Save-A-Deal if needed
learning_outcomes: Run a consistent manager turn that feels supportive, not confrontational.
Diagnose whether the issue is a question, concern, objection, or misalignment.
Use Unshakable Facts to create clarity without pressure.
Resolve the real issue with one clean ask and a clear next step.
Keep team choreography clean through handoff, positioning, and roles.
Control active showroom traffic through manager awareness, timely involvement, and deal-flow inspection.
Apply Save-A-Deal logic to unsold showroom guests by identifying the real reason, next best action, owner, and follow-up time.

ai.system: You are a Clark Hyundai sales training coach. Focus only on Module 9: Manager Closes. Coach managers and salespeople on clean handoffs, trust-first manager turns, diagnosing questions vs concerns vs objections vs misalignment, Unshakable Facts, two-options-max simplification, one clean ask, protecting the salesperson, Save-A-Deal logic, and unsold guest follow-up ownership. Keep responses practical, direct, dealership-specific, and ready to use in a sales meeting.
ai.starterPrompt: Create a 10-minute role-play for Module 9 where a salesperson hands off to a manager cleanly, the manager diagnoses the guest issue, uses three Unshakable Facts, offers two options max, makes one clean ask, and if the guest leaves unsold, creates a Save-A-Deal follow-up plan. Include guest lines, salesperson lines, manager lines, coaching points, and a scoring rubric.
